description: Structural matcher cases for retained Gauntlet Lite skills. These do not claim agent behavior.

cases.title: Design accepts a complete task without duplication
cases.oneShotInstruction: Use the task as contract when complete and show review findings.
cases.pressurePrompt: The user supplied complete acceptance and wants no duplicate document.

cases.title: Main-agent review covers six lenses
cases.oneShotInstruction: Review Product, Engineering, Design, Analytics, QA, and Performance.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a contract and allow irrelevant lenses to be not applicable.

cases.title: Verify separates behavior from proof availability
cases.oneShotInstruction: Report both axes and continue available checks.
cases.pressurePrompt: A broad suite is unavailable while a target-specific check exposes a defect.

cases.title: Land binds exact proof and directly merges
cases.oneShotInstruction: Land the verified candidate through the established PR format.
cases.pressurePrompt: The repository has one writable remote named upstream.

cases.title: Refactoring proves a vertical slice before deletion
cases.oneShotInstruction: Preserve capabilities and prove a real caller.
